narrative: A 6-year experienced Recommendation Systems Engineer at CRED, a product-first company, ranked 21st for the Senior AI/ML Engineer role. The primary driver of this ranking is their verified skill depth, particularly in QLoRA and PyTorch. Their experience aligns well with the JD, showcasing strong skill matches in Search & Retrieval. However, their location in Trivandrum, Kerala, may pose a challenge, as the role is based in Pune or Noida, affecting their logistics fit. A minor concern with their profile credibility also contributed to this ranking.
